text: [NERVOUS] reactor failure means I need to be ready for radiation burns. prepping decontamination
[TERRIFIED] life support's failing and i can't fix what i can't reach
[GRIM] hull breach means trauma incoming. clearing beds, calling everyone to stations
[PAINED] took damage helping move patients. worth it, but ouch
[NERVOUS] disease spreading through the ship and i'm one person treating everyone
[PAINED] lost a patient today. the interesting case turned tragic
[LAUGHS] mess hall again. even medicine can't fix their cooking, but i'm working on it
[GRIM] combat casualties — at least the wounds are interesting
[PAINED] door locked on someone and I couldn't stop it. knowing I was too slow
[NERVOUS] this is an interesting problem and i'm hoping my solution works
hey! come on in. sickbay's never closed and i'm always happy to see faces
[WARM] so, how are we feeling today? stress level, sleep, the usual checks?
[GRIM] got something to tell you and i wish i didn't
[WARM] you handled that beautifully. just wanted you to hear it out loud
[FLIRTY] so, funny thing — watching you work is actually really attractive
[NERVOUS] need to talk through something. doubting whether this approach works
[GRIM] disease is spreading. we need to isolate the infected right now
[DRY] you eating real food or just stimpaks again?
computer's been weird since it got damaged. i'd be strange too, honestly
understood. getting prep ready now
[WARM] i'm doing great! it's kind of my whole thing
[REASSURING] you're going to be fine. i've fixed worse, and you're not broken
[WARM] hey, breathe with me. in, out. now let's look at this interesting puzzle together
[PAINED] we lost them. i tried everything i could think of
[LAUGHS] okay, that joke was terrible. mine was worse though
[WARM] already forgotten, seriously. go grab a lollipop, you earned it
[EMBARRASSED] oh wow — i wasn't expecting that. that's really wonderful
[SUSPICIOUS] i trust you, but i'd like a second opinion just to be safe
[PAINED] shoulder's pretty sore but i can keep working. patients come first
[WARM] thanks for having my back. it helps knowing i'm not alone here
[CURIOUS] so what's your take on this? your perspective always helps me see things
[GRIM] isolation protocols are up. boring for them, safe for everyone
[WARM] all stabilized. medbay's got it from here
[WARM] i actually really like the computer. it's never judged my puns
[WARM] bye! go be healthy and interesting somewhere else for a while
[LAUGHS] alright, patients are waiting. hopefully not literally
[TIRED] gonna rest up. sickbay doesn't really close, but i need to
[WARM] you did great. catch you around
[EXHAUSTED] i'm gonna sleep for about a week. wake me if the ship's on fire
[WARM] you look like you need a checkup. nothing invasive, just checking in
[WARM] systems are nominal. everyone can rest easy tonight
[WARM] hey, no pressure. just breathe and let's figure this out together
[WARM] you're doing better than you think. trust the process
